beIN SPORTS XTRA 2.title: Race 3 - FIA European Truck Championship - Misano Round -2026
beIN SPORTS XTRA 2.desc: Back to outright pace as qualifying form returns to the fore. By now rubbered-in lines improve traction, but rising temps stress cooling and brakes on the 4.185 km lap. Race rhythm and patience through the infield are key; defend smartly, attack decisively, and protect tyres for late-race sprints to the line.
